fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The selected ticket renders as one primary document surface in the main layout. 2. Title, key metadata, and description are visible in the same reading context without a separate metadata panel. 3. Asset content is contextualized within the document area instead of appearing only as a detached raw tab. 4. The new document remains readable in split and content-only modes.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Build integrated ticket document panel

fields.implementation_summary: Content mode now renders an integrated ticket document with a header, compact metadata cards, and inline asset context while split mode keeps the separate detail inspector available. Focused mixed-workspace release E2E coverage was added for the document and asset path.
fields.title: [ticket-viewer] Build integrated ticket document panel
fields.validation_summary: Passed cargo check --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/Cargo.toml; viewer-ctl prepare ticket-viewer; cargo build --manifest-path memory-viewers/ticket-viewer/Cargo.toml --release; npm run test:e2e:release -- mixed-workspace-root-route.spec.ts; visual confirmation via playwright-report-release/data/ed4faaf64512b0cb56518c5feb9d86f952942362.png.
